links.title: UniGRPO: Unified Policy Optimization for Reasoning-Driven Visual Generation

primary_link.title: UniGRPO: Unified Policy Optimization for Reasoning-Driven Visual Generation

papers.summary: Unified models capable of interleaved generation have emerged as a promising paradigm, with the community increasingly converging on autoregressive modeling for text and flow matching for image generation. To advance this direction, we propose a unified reinforcement learning framework tailored for interleaved generation. We validate our approach on its fundamental unit: a single round of reasoning-driven image generation, where the model first expands the user prompt through reasoning, followed by image synthesis. Formulating this multimodal generation process as a Markov Decision Process with sparse terminal rewards, we introduce UniGRPO to jointly optimize text and image generation policies using GRPO. Adopting a minimalist methodology to avoid over-design, we leverage established training recipes for both modalities by seamlessly integrating standard GRPO for reasoning and FlowGRPO for visual synthesis. To ensure scalability to multi-round interleaved generation, we introduce two critical modifications to the original FlowGRPO: (1) eliminating classifier-free guidance to maintain linear, unbranched rollouts, which is essential for scaling to complex scenarios involving multi-turn interactions and multi-condition generation (e.g., editing); and (2) replacing the standard latent KL penalty with an MSE penalty directly on the velocity fields, providing a more robust and direct regularization signal to mitigate reward hacking effectively. Our experiments demonstrate that this unified training recipe significantly enhances image generation quality through reasoning, providing a robust and scalable baseline for the future post-training of fully interleaved models.
papers.summary_zh: 能夠進行 interleaved generation 的統一模型已成為一個有前景的範式，學術界日益趨向於將 autoregressive modeling 用於文字生成，將 flow matching 用於圖像生成。為推進此方向，我們提出了一個專為 interleaved generation 設計的統一 reinforcement learning 框架。我們在其基本單元上驗證了我們的方法：單輪推理驅動的圖像生成，其中模型首先透過 reasoning 擴展使用者 prompt，然後進行 image synthesis。將這種 multimodal generation 過程 формули為一個具有 sparse terminal rewards 的 Markov Decision Process，我們引入 UniGRPO，利用 GRPO 共同優化文字和圖像生成 policies。我們採用極簡主義方法以避免過度設計，透過無縫整合用於 reasoning 的標準 GRPO 和用於 visual synthesis 的 FlowGRPO，利用了兩種 modality 的既定 training recipes。為確保 multi-round interleaved generation 的可擴展性，我們對原始 FlowGRPO 引入了兩項關鍵修改：(1) 消除 classifier-free guidance 以維持線性、非分支的 rollouts，這對於擴展到涉及 multi-turn interactions 和 multi-condition generation (例如 editing) 的複雜場景至關重要；以及 (2) 將標準 latent KL penalty 替換為直接作用於 velocity fields 的 MSE penalty，提供更穩健和直接的 regularization signal，以有效緩解 reward hacking。我們的實驗證明，這種統一的 training recipe 透過 reasoning 顯著提高了圖像生成品質，為未來 fully interleaved models 的 post-training 提供了一個穩健且可擴展的 baseline。

links.title: Rethinking Token-Level Policy Optimization for Multimodal Chain-of-Thought

primary_link.title: Rethinking Token-Level Policy Optimization for Multimodal Chain-of-Thought

papers.summary: Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning requires large vision-language models to construct reasoning trajectories that interleave perceptual grounding with multi-step inference. However, existing Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) methods typically optimize reasoning at a coarse granularity, treating CoT uniformly without distinguishing their varying degrees of visual grounding. In this work, we conduct a token-level analysis of multimodal reasoning trajectories and show that successful reasoning is characterized by structured token dynamics reflecting both perceptual grounding and exploratory inference. Building upon this analysis, we propose Perception-Exploration Policy Optimization (PEPO), which derives a perception prior from hidden state similarity and integrates it with token entropy through a smooth gating mechanism to produce token-level advantages. PEPO integrates seamlessly with existing RLVR frameworks such as GRPO and DAPO, requiring neither additional supervision nor auxiliary branches. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate consistent and robust improvements over strong RL baselines, spanning geometry reasoning, visual grounding, visual puzzle solving, and few-shot classification, while maintaining stable training dynamics. Code: https://github.com/xzxxntxdy/PEPO

links.title: ABot-PhysWorld: Interactive World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Physics Alignment

primary_link.title: ABot-PhysWorld: Interactive World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Physics Alignment

papers.summary: Video-based world models offer a powerful paradigm for embodied simulation and planning, yet state-of-the-art models often generate physically implausible manipulations - such as object penetration and anti-gravity motion - due to training on generic visual data and likelihood-based objectives that ignore physical laws. We present ABot-PhysWorld, a 14B Diffusion Transformer model that generates visually realistic, physically plausible, and action-controllable videos. Built on a curated dataset of three million manipulation clips with physics-aware annotation, it uses a novel DPO-based post-training framework with decoupled discriminators to suppress unphysical behaviors while preserving visual quality. A parallel context block enables precise spatial action injection for cross-embodiment control. To better evaluate generalization, we introduce EZSbench, the first training-independent embodied zero-shot benchmark combining real and synthetic unseen robot-task-scene combinations. It employs a decoupled protocol to separately assess physical realism and action alignment. ABot-PhysWorld achieves new state-of-the-art performance on PBench and EZSbench, surpassing Veo 3.1 and Sora v2 Pro in physical plausibility and trajectory consistency. We will release EZSbench to promote standardized evaluation in embodied video generation.
papers.summary_zh: 基於影像的世界模型為具身模擬和規劃提供了一個強大的範式，然而，最先進的模型由於在通用視覺資料和忽略物理定律的基於似然的目標上進行訓練，常常會產生物理上不合理的操縱——例如物體穿透和反重力運動。我們提出了 ABot-PhysWorld，一個 14B Diffusion Transformer 模型，它能生成視覺真實、物理合理且動作可控的影片。該模型建立在包含三百萬個帶有物理感知註釋的精選資料集上，它採用了一種新穎的基於 DPO 的後訓練框架，結合解耦的判別器來抑制非物理行為，同時保持視覺品質。一個並行上下文區塊實現了精確的空間動作注入，用於跨具身控制。為了更好地評估泛化能力，我們引入了 EZSbench，這是第一個獨立於訓練的具身 zero-shot benchmark，它結合了真實和合成的未見過機器人-任務-場景組合。它採用了解耦協議，分別評估物理真實性和動作對齊。ABot-PhysWorld 在 PBench 和 EZSbench 上實現了新的最先進性能，在物理合理性和軌跡一致性方面超越了 Veo 3.1 和 Sora v2 Pro。我們將發布 EZSbench 以促進具身影片生成領域的標準化評估。

radar.summary_zh: 由於結構化或非結構化的真實世界動態，機器學習模型在部署後通常需要適應新資料。Continual Learning (CL) 框架能夠實現模型的持續適應，但大多數現有方法要嘛假設每個任務包含足夠多的資料樣本，要嘛假設學習任務是非重疊的。在本文中，我們解決了更一般化的設定，即每個任務可能只有有限的資料集，並且任務可能以任意方式重疊，而無需事先
radar.title: Similarity-Aware Mixture-of-Experts for Data-Efficient Continual Learning
radar.title_zh: 用於資料高效持續學習的相似性感知專家混合模型

links.title: Prompt Amplification and Zero-Shot Late Fusion in Audio-Language Models for Speech Emotion Recognition

primary_link.title: Prompt Amplification and Zero-Shot Late Fusion in Audio-Language Models for Speech Emotion Recognition

radar.summary: Audio-Language Models (ALMs) are making strides in understanding speech and non-speech audio. However, domain-specialist Foundation Models (FMs) remain the best for closed-ended speech processing tasks such as Speech Emotion Recognition (SER). Using ALMs for Zero-shot SER is a popular choice, but their potential to work with specialists to achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance remains unexplored. We propose ZS-Fuse, a late-fusion method that combines zero-shot emotion estimates from a dual
radar.summary_zh: Audio-Language Models (ALMs) 在理解語音和非語音音訊方面取得了進展。然而，對於語音情感識別 (SER) 等封閉式語音處理任務，領域專家 Foundation Models (FMs) 仍然表現最佳。將 ALMs 用於 Zero-shot SER 是一種流行的選擇，但其與專家協作以實現最先進 (SOTA) 效能的潛力仍未被探索。我們提出了 ZS-Fuse，這是一種後期融合方法，它結合了來自雙重
radar.title: Prompt Amplification and Zero-Shot Late Fusion in Audio-Language Models for Speech Emotion Recognition
radar.title_zh: 語音情感識別中 Audio-Language Models 的提示放大與零樣本後期融合

links.title: Parametric Knowledge and Retrieval Behavior in RAG Fine-Tuning for Electronic Design Automation

primary_link.title: Parametric Knowledge and Retrieval Behavior in RAG Fine-Tuning for Electronic Design Automation

radar.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fine-tuning has shown substantial improvements over vanilla RAG, yet most studies target document question answering and often rely on standard NLP metrics that can obscure factual differences. We evaluate RAG fine-tuning for long-form text generation in electronic design automation, adapting a 7B model under five context augmentation strategies with varying retrieval conditions. radar.summary_zh: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fine-tuning 相比傳統 RAG 顯示出顯著改進，然而大多數研究都針對文件問答，並且通常依賴於可能模糊事實差異的標準 NLP 指標。我們評估了 RAG fine-tuning 在電子設計自動化中用於長篇文本生成的效能，在五種不同的上下文增強策略和不同檢索條件下調整了一個 7B 模型。我們引入了 TriFEX，這是一個經人工驗證、基於三元組的評估流程，它在
radar.title: Parametric Knowledge and Retrieval Behavior in RAG Fine-Tuning for Electronic Design Automation
radar.title_zh: 電子設計自動化中 RAG Fine-Tuning 的參數化知識與檢索行為

links.title: Beyond Theoretical Bounds: Empirical Privacy Loss Calibration for Text Rewriting Under Local Differential Privacy

primary_link.title: Beyond Theoretical Bounds: Empirical Privacy Loss Calibration for Text Rewriting Under Local Differential Privacy

radar.summary: The growing use of large language models has increased interest in sharing textual data in a privacy-preserving manner. One prominent line of work addresses this challenge through text rewriting under Local Differential Privacy (LDP), where input texts are locally obfuscated before release with formal privacy guarantees. radar.summary_zh: 大型語言模型的日益普及，增加了人們對以保護隱私的方式共享文本資料的興趣。一項重要的研究方向是透過局部差分隱私 (LDP) 下的文本重寫來應對這一挑戰，其中輸入文本在發布前會進行局部模糊化，並提供正式的隱私保障。這些保障通常由參數 $\varepsilon$ 表示，它為最壞情況下的隱私損失設定了上限。然而，名義上的 $\varepsilon$ 值通常難以
radar.title: Beyond Theoretical Bounds: Empirical Privacy Loss Calibration for Text Rewriting Under Local Differential Privacy
radar.title_zh: 超越理論界限：局部差分隱私下文本重寫的經驗隱私損失校準

links.title: SLARM: Streaming and Language-Aligned Reconstruction Model for Dynamic Scenes

primary_link.title: SLARM: Streaming and Language-Aligned Reconstruction Model for Dynamic Scenes

radar.summary: We propose SLARM, a feed-forward model that unifies dynamic scene reconstruction, semantic understanding, and real-time streaming inference. SLARM captures complex, non-uniform motion through higher-order motion modeling, trained solely on differentiable renderings without any flow supervision. Besides, SLARM distills semantic features from LSeg to obtain language-aligned representations. This design enables semantic querying via natural language, and the tight coupling between semantics and geo
radar.summary_zh: 我們提出了 SLARM，這是一個前饋模型，它統一了動態場景重建、語義理解和即時串流推斷。SLARM 透過高階運動建模來捕捉複雜、非均勻的運動，並且僅透過可微分渲染進行訓練，無需任何 flow supervision。此外，SLARM 從 LSeg 中提取語義特徵，以獲得語言對齊的表示。這種設計使得透過自然語言進行語義查詢成為可能，並且實現了語義與幾何之間的緊密耦合。
radar.title: SLARM: Streaming and Language-Aligned Reconstruction Model for Dynamic Scenes
radar.title_zh: SLARM: 用於動態場景的串流與語言對齊重建模型

links.title: Grounding Sim-to-Real Generalization in Dexterous Manipulation: An Empirical Study with Vision-Language-Action Models

primary_link.title: Grounding Sim-to-Real Generalization in Dexterous Manipulation: An Empirical Study with Vision-Language-Action Models

radar.summary: Learning a generalist control policy for dexterous manipulation typically relies on large-scale datasets. Given the high cost of real-world data collection, a practical alternative is to generate synthetic data through simulation. However, the resulting synthetic data often exhibits a significant gap from real-world distributions. While many prior studies have proposed algorithms to bridge the Sim-to-Real discrepancy, there remains a lack of principled research that grounds these methods in real
radar.summary_zh: 為靈巧操作學習一個通用控制策略通常依賴於大規模數據集。考慮到真實世界數據採集的成本高昂，一個實用的替代方案是透過模擬生成合成數據。然而，由此產生的合成數據通常與真實世界分佈存在顯著差異。儘管許多先前的研究提出了彌補 Sim-to-Real 差異的演算法，但仍缺乏將這些方法奠基於真實情境的原則性研究。

radar.title_zh: 奠基 Sim-to-Real 泛化能力於靈巧操作：透過 Vision-Language-Action 模型進行實證研究

links.title: Is AI Catching Up to Human Expression? Exploring Emotion, Personality, Authorship, and Linguistic Style in English and Arabic with Six Large Language Models

primary_link.title: Is AI Catching Up to Human Expression? Exploring Emotion, Personality, Authorship, and Linguistic Style in English and Arabic with Six Large Language Models

radar.summary: The advancing fluency of LLMs raises important questions about their ability to emulate complex human traits, including emotional expression and personality, across diverse linguistic and cultural contexts. This study investigates whether LLMs can convincingly mimic emotional nuance in English and personality markers in Arabic, a critical under-resourced language with unique linguistic and cultural characteristics. We conduct two tasks across six models:Jais, Mistral, LLaMA, GPT-4o, Gemini, and
radar.summary_zh: LLMs 日益進步的流暢度引發了關於它們在多樣的語言和文化背景下模仿複雜人類特徵（包括情感表達和個性）能力的重大問題。本研究旨在探討 LLMs 是否能在英語中可信地模仿情感細微差別，以及在阿拉伯語（一種具有獨特語言和文化特徵的關鍵資源匱乏語言）中模仿個性標誌。我們針對六個模型：Jais, Mistral, LLaMA, GPT-4o, Gemini 進行了兩項任務。
radar.title: Is AI Catching Up to Human Expression? Exploring Emotion, Personality, Authorship, and Linguistic Style in English and Arabic with Six Large Language Models
radar.title_zh: AI 是否能追上人類表達？透過六個大型語言模型探索英語和阿拉伯語中的情感、個性、作者身份和語言風格

links.title: TRINE: A Token-Aware, Runtime-Adaptive FPGA Inference Engine for Multimodal AI

primary_link.title: TRINE: A Token-Aware, Runtime-Adaptive FPGA Inference Engine for Multimodal AI

radar.summary: Multimodal stacks that mix ViTs, CNNs, GNNs, and transformer NLP strain embedded platforms because their compute/memory patterns diverge and hard real-time targets leave little slack. TRINE is a single-bitstream FPGA accelerator and compiler that executes end-to-end multimodal inference without reconfiguration. radar.summary_zh: 結合 ViTs、CNNs、GNNs 和 transformer NLP 的多模態堆疊會使嵌入式平台承受壓力，因為它們的計算/記憶體模式存在差異，且嚴格的即時目標留下了很小的裕度。TRINE 是一個單一位元流 FPGA 加速器和編譯器，無需重新配置即可執行端到端多模態推斷。層被統一為 DDMM/SDDMM/SpMM 並映射到一個模式可切換引擎，該引擎在運行時可在 weight/output-stationary systolic、1xCS SIMD 和可路由加法器樹 (RADT) 之間切換。
radar.title: TRINE: A Token-Aware, Runtime-Adaptive FPGA Inference Engine for Multimodal AI
radar.title_zh: TRINE: 一種令牌感知、運行時自適應的 FPGA 推理引擎，用於多模態 AI

links.title: 3DCity-LLM: Empowering Multi-modality Large Language Models for 3D City-scale Perception and Understanding

primary_link.title: 3DCity-LLM: Empowering Multi-modality Large Language Models for 3D City-scale Perception and Understanding

To facilitate large-scale training, we i
radar.summary_zh: 儘管多模態大型語言模型在以物體為中心或室內場景中表現出色，但將它們擴展到 3D 城市規模環境仍然是一個艱鉅的挑戰。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了 3DCity-LLM，這是一個旨在用於 3D 城市規模視覺-語言感知與理解的統一框架。3DCity-LLM 採用一種從粗到細的特徵編碼策略，包含三個平行分支，分別用於目標物體、物體間關係和全局場景。為了促進大規模訓練，我們引入了...
radar.title: 3DCity-LLM: Empowering Multi-modality Large Language Models for 3D City-scale Perception and Understanding
radar.title_zh: 3DCity-LLM: 賦能多模態大型語言模型用於 3D 城市規模的感知與理解

links.title: GEM: Guided Expectation-Maximization for Behavior-Normalized Candidate Action Selection in Offline RL

primary_link.title: GEM: Guided Expectation-Maximization for Behavior-Normalized Candidate Action Selection in Offline RL

radar.summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can fit strong value functions from fixed datasets, yet reliable deployment still hinges on the action selection interface used to query them. radar.summary_zh: 離線強化學習 (Offline reinforcement learning, RL) 可以從固定數據集中擬合出強大的價值函數，但其可靠的部署仍然取決於用於查詢這些函數的動作選擇介面。當數據集產生分支或多模態的動作格局時，單模態策略提取可能會模糊相互競爭的假設，並產生數據支持薄弱的「中間」動作，即使有強大的 critic，也會使決策變得脆弱。我們引入了 GEM (Guided Expectation-Maximization)，這是一個分析框架...
radar.title: GEM: Guided Expectation-Maximization for Behavior-Normalized Candidate Action Selection in Offline RL
radar.title_zh: GEM：用於離線 RL 中行為正規化候選動作選擇的引導式期望最大化

links.title: HGNet: Scalable Foundation Model for Automated Knowledge Graph Generation from Scientific Literature

primary_link.title: HGNet: Scalable Foundation Model for Automated Knowledge Graph Generation from Scientific Literature

radar.summary: Automated knowledge graph (KG) construction is essential for navigating the rapidly expanding body of scientific literature. However, existing approaches struggle to recognize long multi-word entities, often fail to generalize across domains, and typically overlook the hierarchical nature of scientific knowledge. radar.summary_zh: 自動化知識圖譜 (KG) 的建構對於瀏覽快速增長的科學文獻至關重要。然而，現有方法難以識別長多詞實體，通常無法跨領域泛化，並且通常忽略科學知識的層次結構。儘管通用型大型語言模型 (LLMs) 提供了適應性，但它們計算成本高昂，並且在專業任務上的準確性不一致。因此，目前的 KGs...
radar.title: HGNet: Scalable Foundation Model for Automated Knowledge Graph Generation from Scientific Literature
radar.title_zh: HGNet：用於從科學文獻自動生成知識圖譜的可擴展基礎模型

links.title: AuthorMix: Modular Authorship Style Transfer via Layer-wise Adapter Mixing

primary_link.title: AuthorMix: Modular Authorship Style Transfer via Layer-wise Adapter Mixing

radar.summary: The task of authorship style transfer involves rewriting text in the style of a target author while preserving the meaning of the original text. Existing style transfer methods train a single model on large corpora to model all target styles at once: this high-cost approach offers limited flexibility for target-specific adaptation, and often sacrifices meaning preservation for style transfer. In this paper, we propose AuthorMix: a lightweight, modular, and interpretable style transfer framework.
radar.summary_zh: 作者風格遷移的任務涉及以目標作者的風格重寫文本，同時保留原始文本的含義。現有的 style transfer 方法在大型語料庫上訓練單一模型，以同時建模所有目標風格：這種高成本方法在針對特定目標的適應性方面靈活性有限，並且通常為了 style transfer 而犧牲含義保留。在本文中，我們提出了 AuthorMix：一個輕量級、模組化且可解釋的 style transfer 框架。

links.title: VQ-Jarvis: Retrieval-Augmented Video Restoration Agent with Sharp Vision and Fast Thought

primary_link.title: VQ-Jarvis: Retrieval-Augmented Video Restoration Agent with Sharp Vision and Fast Thought

radar.summary_zh: 實際場景中的影片修復面臨異質降級的挑戰，其中靜態架構和固定推理管道通常無法泛化。最近基於 agent 的方法提供了動態決策，但現有的影片修復 agent 仍然受限於不充分的品質感知和低效的搜索策略。我們提出了 VQ-Jarvis，這是一個檢索增強型、一體化的智慧影片修復 agent，具有更敏銳的視覺和更快速的思考能力。VQ-Jarvis 是...

links.title: From Morality Installation in LLMs to LLMs in Morality-as-a-System

primary_link.title: From Morality Installation in LLMs to LLMs in Morality-as-a-System

radar.summary: Work on morality in large language models (LLMs) has progressed via constitutional AI, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and systematic benchmarking, yet it still lacks tools to connect internal moral representations to regulatory obligations, to design cultural plurality across the full development stack, and to monitor how moral properties drift over the lifecycle of a deployed system. radar.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 中的道德研究已透過 Constitutional AI、人類回饋強化學習 (RLHF) 和系統性基準測試取得進展，但仍缺乏工具來將內部道德表徵與監管義務聯繫起來，設計跨越整個開發堆棧的文化多元性，以及監測部署系統生命週期中道德屬性如何漂移。這些困難反映了一個共同的根源。道德在模型訓練時被安裝。
radar.title: From Morality Installation in LLMs to LLMs in Morality-as-a-System
radar.title_zh: 從 LLMs 中的道德安裝到道德即系統中的 LLMs

links.title: Multilingual KokoroChat: A Multi-LLM Ensemble Translation Method for Creating a Multilingual Counseling Dialogue Dataset

primary_link.title: Multilingual KokoroChat: A Multi-LLM Ensemble Translation Method for Creating a Multilingual Counseling Dialogue Dataset

In a sensitive domain like counseling, where the highest possible tr
radar.summary_zh: 為了解決高品質、公開可用的諮詢對話數據集嚴重稀缺的問題，我們將大規模人工編撰的日語諮詢語料庫 KokoroChat 翻譯成英文和中文，從而創建了 Multilingual KokoroChat。此過程中的一個關鍵挑戰是，最佳的翻譯模型會因輸入而異，使得任何單一模型都無法始終保證最高品質。在諮詢這種敏感領域中，需要盡可能最高的翻譯品質。

radar.title_zh: Multilingual KokoroChat：一種用於創建多語言諮詢對話數據集的 Multi-LLM 整合翻譯方法

radar.summary_zh: 3D 場景中的功能性分割要求代理將隱式 natural-language instructions 定位到細粒度交互元素的精確遮罩中。現有方法依賴於碎片化的 pipelines，這些 pipelines 在初始任務解析期間會出現視覺盲點。我們觀察到這些方法受到單尺度、被動和啟發式 frame selection 的限制。我們提出了 UniFunc3D，一個統一且 training-free 的框架，將 multimodal large language model 視為一個 active observer。

radar.title_zh: UniFunc3D：用於 3D 功能性分割的統一主動時空定位

radar.summary_zh: 為數據庫構建 natural language interface（即 NLIDB）的任務，最近在數據庫和 Natural Language Processing (NLP) 社群中都受到了顯著關注。隨著由 location-aware sensors 快速興起所推動的 geospatial datasets 的普及，geospatial databases 在支持 geospatial applications 方面發揮著至關重要的作用。然而，查詢 geospatial 和 temporal databases 與查詢 traditional relational databases 存在實質性差異。

radar.summary_zh: 我們研究了 neural ordinary 和 stochastic differential equations (neural ODEs 和 SDEs)，以在 model-based reinforcement learning (RL) 框架內，對完全和部分觀察到的環境中的 stochastic dynamics 進行建模。通過一系列模擬，我們表明 neural SDEs 能更有效地捕捉 transition dynamics 的固有 stochasticity，從而在具有挑戰性的場景中實現具有改進 sample efficiency 的 high-performing policies。我們利用 neural ODEs 和 SDEs 進行高效規劃。

radar.summary_zh: 我們研究了在滿足 \emph{linear Bellman completeness} 的 Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) 中，使用 linear function approximation 的 reinforcement learning (RL)——這是一個基本設置，其中任何 linear value function 的 Bellman backup 仍然是線性的。儘管在統計上是可處理的，但先前的 computationally efficient algorithms 要么僅限於 small action spaces，要么需要對 feature space 有很強的 oracle assumptions。我們為 linear Bellman complete MDPs 提供了一種 computationally efficient algorithm。

links.title: SpecEyes: Accelerating Agentic Multimodal LLMs via Speculative Perception and Planning

primary_link.title: SpecEyes: Accelerating Agentic Multimodal LLMs via Speculative Perception and Planning

top5.summary: Agentic multimodal large language models (MLLMs) (e.g., OpenAI o3 and Gemini Agentic Vision) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through iterative visual tool invocation. However, the cascaded perception, reasoning, and tool-calling loops introduce significant sequential overhead. This overhead, termed agentic depth, incurs prohibitive latency and seriously limits system-level concurrency. To this end, we propose SpecEyes, an agentic-level speculative acceleration framework that breaks this sequential bottleneck. Our key insight is that a lightweight, tool-free MLLM can serve as a speculative planner to predict the execution trajectory, enabling early termination of expensive tool chains without sacrificing accuracy. To regulate this speculative planning, we introduce a cognitive gating mechanism based on answer separability, which quantifies the model's confidence for self-verification without requiring oracle labels. Furthermore, we design a heterogeneous parallel funnel that exploits the stateless concurrency of the small model to mask the stateful serial execution of the large model, maximizing system throughput. Extensive experiments on V* Bench, HR-Bench, and POPE demonstrate that SpecEyes achieves 1.1-3.35x speedup over the agentic baseline while preserving or even improving accuracy (up to +6.7%), thereby boosting serving throughput under concurrent workloads.
top5.summary_zh: Agentic multimodal large language models (MLLMs)（例如 OpenAI o3 和 Gemini Agentic Vision）透過迭代的視覺工具調用，實現了卓越的推理能力。然而，級聯的感知、推理和工具調用循環引入了顯著的序列開銷。這種開銷，稱為 agentic depth，導致了高昂的延遲，並嚴重限制了系統級併發性。為此，我們提出 SpecEyes，一個 agentic 級別的推測性加速框架，它打破了這個序列瓶頸。我們的關鍵見解是，一個輕量級、無需工具的 MLLM 可以作為推測性規劃器來預測執行軌跡，從而在不犧牲準確性的情況下，實現昂貴工具鏈的提前終止。為了規範這種推測性規劃，我們引入了一種基於答案可分離性 (answer separability) 的認知門控機制，它量化了模型進行自我驗證的信心，而無需 oracle labels。此外，我們設計了一個異構並行漏斗 (heterogeneous parallel funnel)，它利用小模型的無狀態併發性來掩蓋大模型的有狀態序列執行，從而最大化系統吞吐量。在 V* Bench、HR-Bench 和 POPE 上的廣泛實驗表明，SpecEyes 相較於 agentic baseline 實現了 1.1-3.35 倍的加速，同時保持甚至提高了準確性（高達 +6.7%），從而在併發工作負載下提升了服務吞吐量。
top5.title: SpecEyes: Accelerating Agentic Multimodal LLMs via Speculative Perception and Planning
top5.title_zh: SpecEyes：透過推測性感知與規劃加速 Agentic Multimodal LLMs

links.title: Agent Audit: A Security Analysis System for LLM Agent Applications

primary_link.title: Agent Audit: A Security Analysis System for LLM Agent Applications

top5.summary:
What should a developer inspect before deploying an LLM agent: the model, the tool code, the deployment configuration, or all three? In practice, many security failures in agent systems arise not from model weights alone, but from the surrounding software stack: tool functions that pass untrusted inputs to dangerous operations, exposed credentials in deployment artifacts, and over-privileged Model Context Protocol (MCP) configurations.
  We present Agent Audit, a security analysis system for LLM
top5.summary_zh: 開發人員在部署 LLM agent 之前應該檢查什麼：模型本身、工具代碼、部署配置，還是全部三者？在實踐中，agent 系統中的許多安全故障不僅僅來自於模型權重本身，而是源於其周圍的軟體堆棧：將不可信輸入傳遞給危險操作的工具函數、部署成品中暴露的憑證，以及過度授權的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 配置。我們介紹 Agent Audit，一個用於 LLM 的安全分析系統。
top5.title: Agent Audit: A Security Analysis System for LLM Agent Applications
top5.title_zh: Agent Audit：一個用於 LLM Agent 應用的安全分析系統

links.title: WildWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset for Dynamic World Modeling with Actions and Explicit State toward Generative ARPG

primary_link.title: WildWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset for Dynamic World Modeling with Actions and Explicit State toward Generative ARPG

top5.summary: Dynamical systems theory and reinforcement learning view world evolution as latent-state dynamics driven by actions, with visual observations providing partial information about the state. Recent video world models attempt to learn this action-conditioned dynamics from data. However, existing datasets rarely match the requirement: they typically lack diverse and semantically meaningful action spaces, and actions are directly tied to visual observations rather than mediated by underlying states. As a result, actions are often entangled with pixel-level changes, making it difficult for models to learn structured world dynamics and maintain consistent evolution over long horizons. In this paper, we propose WildWorld, a large-scale action-conditioned world modeling dataset with explicit state annotations, automatically collected from a photorealistic AAA action role-playing game (Monster Hunter: Wilds). WildWorld contains over 108 million frames and features more than 450 actions, including movement, attacks, and skill casting, together with synchronized per-frame annotations of character skeletons, world states, camera poses, and depth maps. We further derive WildBench to evaluate models through Action Following and State Alignment. Extensive experiments reveal persistent challenges in modeling semantically rich actions and maintaining long-horizon state consistency, highlighting the need for state-aware video generation. The project page is https://shandaai.github.io/wildworld-project/.
top5.summary_zh: 動力系統理論和強化學習將世界的演變視為由動作驅動的潛在狀態動態，視覺觀察提供了關於狀態的部分資訊。最近的影片世界模型試圖從數據中學習這種動作條件的動態。然而，現有數據集很少符合要求：它們通常缺乏多樣化且語義豐富的動作空間，並且動作直接與視覺觀察綁定，而非由底層狀態中介。結果，動作往往與像素級變化糾纏不清，使得模型難以學習結構化的世界動態並在長時程內保持一致的演變。在本文中，我們提出了 WildWorld，一個大規模的動作條件世界建模數據集，具有顯式狀態註釋，它從逼真的 AAA 動作角色扮演遊戲 (Monster Hunter: Wilds) 中自動收集。WildWorld 包含超過 1.08 億幀，並具有超過 450 種動作，包括移動、攻擊和技能施放，以及角色骨骼、世界狀態、攝影機姿態和深度圖的同步逐幀註釋。我們進一步推導了 WildBench，通過 Action Following 和 State Alignment 來評估模型。大量實驗揭示了在建模語義豐富的動作和維持長時程狀態一致性方面的持續挑戰，突顯了狀態感知影片生成的必要性。項目頁面為 https://shandaai.github.io/wildworld-project/。
top5.title: WildWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset for Dynamic World Modeling with Actions and Explicit State toward Generative ARPG
top5.title_zh: WildWorld：一個用於動態世界建模的大規模數據集，具有動作和顯式狀態，面向生成式 ARPG

links.title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself

primary_link.title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself

top5.summary: If autoresearch is itself a form of research, then autoresearch can be applied to research itself. We take this idea literally: we use an autoresearch loop to optimize the autoresearch loop. Every existing autoresearch system -- from Karpathy's single-track loop to AutoResearchClaw's multi-batch extension and EvoScientist's persistent memory -- was improved by a human who read the code, identified a bottleneck, and wrote new code. top5.summary_zh: 如果 autoresearch 本身是一種研究形式，那麼 autoresearch 就可以應用於研究本身。我們將這個想法付諸實踐：我們使用一個 autoresearch 循環來優化 autoresearch 循環。每個現有的 autoresearch 系統——從 Karpathy 的單軌循環到 AutoResearchClaw 的多批次擴展以及 EvoScientist 的持久記憶體——都是由人類改進的，他們閱讀代碼，識別瓶頸，並編寫新代碼。我們問一個 LLM 是否能自主地做到這一點。我們提出 B
